questionHtml: Describe the relationship between increasing H2O2 concentration and catalase activity.
markschemeHtml:
a. as H2O2 concentration increases catalase activity increases / positive correlation
(up to 70 mM) 

b. peak activity at approximately 70 mM 

c. activity decreases after the peak

meta.title: Describe the relationship between increasing H2O2 concentration and catalase activity.
